help.synopsis: Run the PowerShell submenu installer (script 31) + VS Code folder repair (script 52) in one guided pass.
usage: .\run.ps1 dry-run         # preview only, no registry writes
.\run.ps1 status          # show what each component would touch
notes: Requires Administrator (both child scripts write to HKCR).
Each component logs its own changes; this bundle prints a final summary.
Use -Yes to skip prompts; -Skip pwsh|vscode to exclude one component.

messages.banner: Context Menu Bundle -- PowerShell submenu + VS Code folder repair
messages.notAdmin: Administrator privileges required. Re-run from an elevated PowerShell.
messages.componentMissing: [FAIL] Component path not found: {0} (reason: missing run.ps1)
messages.dryRunHeader: DRY-RUN -- no registry writes will occur. Planned changes:
